label: Building properties
description: Building-specific properties covering placement rules, bed and turret stats, door behavior, trap behavior, storage, work table roles, and mech gestator settings.

isEdifice.label: Is edifice
isEdifice.description: If true, only one edifice can occupy a cell (walls, floors, beds). Most buildings are edifices.

buildingTags.label: Building tags
buildingTags.description: String tags used by mech cluster and other generation rules to categorize this building.

isInert.label: Is inert
isInert.description: If true, this building never ticks and has no active behavior.

isTargetable.label: Is targetable
isTargetable.description: Whether this building can be targeted by attacks and abilities.

deconstructible.label: Deconstructible
deconstructible.description: Whether the player can deconstruct this building to recover materials. Private in source but used in shipped XML.

alwaysDeconstructible.label: Always deconstructible
alwaysDeconstructible.description: If true, this building can always be deconstructed even if deconstructible is false.

alwaysUninstallable.label: Always uninstallable
alwaysUninstallable.description: If true, this building can always be uninstalled regardless of other flags.

leavingsBlacklist.label: Leavings blacklist
leavingsBlacklist.description: ThingDef references excluded from the deconstruct leavings list for this building.

forcedCostLeavings.label: Forced cost leavings
forcedCostLeavings.description: ThingDef references always included in the leavings regardless of deconstruct efficiency.

claimable.label: Claimable
claimable.description: Whether colonists can claim this building when it is unowned.

isSittable.label: Is sittable
isSittable.description: Whether pawns can sit on or at this building for comfort and joy.

multiSittable.label: Multi-sittable
multiSittable.description: If true, more than one pawn can sit at this building simultaneously.

sitIgnoreOrientation.label: Sit ignore orientation
sitIgnoreOrientation.description: If true, pawns can sit at this building from any direction regardless of its rotation.

spawnedConceptLearnOpportunity.label: Spawned concept learn opportunity
spawnedConceptLearnOpportunity.description: ConceptDef marked as learned the first time this building is placed on the map.

boughtConceptLearnOpportunity.label: Bought concept learn opportunity
boughtConceptLearnOpportunity.description: ConceptDef marked as learned the first time this building is purchased from a trader.

expandHomeArea.label: Expand home area
expandHomeArea.description: If true, placing this building expands the home area to cover its footprint.

blueprintClass.label: Blueprint class
blueprintClass.description: C# class used to instantiate the construction blueprint for this building.

blueprintGraphicData.label: Blueprint graphic data
blueprintGraphicData.description: Custom graphic shown on the construction blueprint instead of the default ghost graphic.

uninstallWork.label: Uninstall work
uninstallWork.description: Work ticks required to uninstall this building.

forceShowRoomStats.label: Force show room stats
forceShowRoomStats.description: If true, room stats are always shown in the inspect pane for this building.

neverBuildable.label: Never buildable
neverBuildable.description: If true, this building never appears in the architect menu and cannot be built by the player.

isWall.label: Is wall
isWall.description: Whether this building behaves as a wall for room formation and linking purposes.

alwaysExchangeVacuum.label: Always exchange vacuum
alwaysExchangeVacuum.description: If true, this building always allows vacuum exchange through its cell.

canExchangeVacuum.label: Can exchange vacuum
canExchangeVacuum.description: If true, this building can participate in vacuum exchange when open or powered.

draftAttackNonDeconstructable.label: Draft attack non-deconstructable
draftAttackNonDeconstructable.description: If true, drafted colonists can melee-attack this building even if it cannot be deconstructed.

wantsHopperAdjacent.label: Wants hopper adjacent
wantsHopperAdjacent.description: If true, this building requires a hopper placed adjacent to it to function.

allowWireConnection.label: Allow wire connection
allowWireConnection.description: Whether power conduits can connect to this building.

shipPart.label: Ship part
shipPart.description: If true, this building is treated as a spaceship component for the ship launch sequence.

canPlaceOverImpassablePlant.label: Can place over impassable plant
canPlaceOverImpassablePlant.description: If true, this building can be placed over impassable plants without requiring them to be cut first.

heatPerTickWhileWorking.label: Heat per tick while working
heatPerTickWhileWorking.description: Heat units added to the room per game tick while this building is actively working.

canBuildNonEdificesUnder.label: Can build non-edifices under
canBuildNonEdificesUnder.description: If true, non-edifice buildings (floors, conduits) can be placed in cells under this building.

canPlaceOverWall.label: Can place over wall
canPlaceOverWall.description: If true, this building can be placed on top of an existing wall.

isPlaceOverableWall.label: Is place-overable wall
isPlaceOverableWall.description: If true, other buildings with canPlaceOverWall can be placed on top of this wall.

allowAutoroof.label: Allow autoroof
allowAutoroof.description: Whether the auto-roof system can place a roof over this building.

preventDeteriorationOnTop.label: Prevent deterioration on top
preventDeteriorationOnTop.description: If true, items placed on top of this building do not deteriorate.

preventDeteriorationInside.label: Prevent deterioration inside
preventDeteriorationInside.description: If true, items stored inside this building (e.g. shelf) do not deteriorate.

isMealSource.label: Is meal source
isMealSource.description: If true, this building is considered a meal dispenser for colonist dining behavior.

isNaturalRock.label: Is natural rock
isNaturalRock.description: Whether this building is treated as a natural rock chunk or wall for mining purposes.

isResourceRock.label: Is resource rock
isResourceRock.description: If true, this building yields resources when mined.

repairable.label: Repairable
repairable.description: Whether colonists can repair damage to this building.

roofCollapseDamageMultiplier.label: Roof collapse damage multiplier
roofCollapseDamageMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to damage received when a roof collapses on this building.

hasFuelingPort.label: Has fueling port
hasFuelingPort.description: If true, this building has a fueling port for launching ships or other fuel-consuming actions.

smoothedThing.label: Smoothed thing
smoothedThing.description: ThingDef this building becomes when smoothed by a colonist (e.g. rough rock to smooth wall).

naturalTerrain.label: Natural terrain
naturalTerrain.description: TerrainDef placed under this building when it is first spawned on the map.

leaveTerrain.label: Leave terrain
leaveTerrain.description: TerrainDef left in the cell when this building is destroyed or deconstructed.

combatPower.label: Combat power
combatPower.description: Point value of this building when used in mech cluster budget calculations.

minMechClusterPoints.label: Min mech cluster points
minMechClusterPoints.description: Minimum raid point budget at which this building can appear in a mech cluster.

destroyShakeAmount.label: Destroy shake amount
destroyShakeAmount.description: Camera shake intensity when this building is destroyed. -1 uses a default based on size.

destroySound.label: Destroy sound
destroySound.description: SoundDef played when this building is destroyed.

soundMeleeHitOverride.label: Sound melee hit override
soundMeleeHitOverride.description: SoundDef played when a pawn strikes this building in melee, overriding the default impact sound.

destroyEffecter.label: Destroy effecter
destroyEffecter.description: EffecterDef played at this building's location when it is destroyed.

buildingSizeCategory.label: Building size category
buildingSizeCategory.description: Broad size classification used by stats and display logic.

isFence.label: Is fence
isFence.description: Whether this building acts as a fence that blocks certain animals from passing.

relatedBuildCommands.label: Related build commands
relatedBuildCommands.description: ThingDef references shown as related build buttons in the architect menu when this building is selected.

relatedTerrain.label: Related terrain
relatedTerrain.description: TerrainDef references shown as related build options when this building is selected.

alwaysShowRelatedBuildCommands.label: Always show related build commands
alwaysShowRelatedBuildCommands.description: If true, related build commands are always visible in the architect menu regardless of build mode.

useIdeoColor.label: Use ideo color
useIdeoColor.description: If true, this building is tinted with the colony's ideoligion color.

wakeDormantPawnsOnConstruction.label: Wake dormant pawns on construction
wakeDormantPawnsOnConstruction.description: Whether placing this building wakes nearby dormant pawns.

maxItemsInCell.label: Max items in cell
maxItemsInCell.description: Maximum number of items allowed in a single cell of this building.

paintable.label: Paintable
paintable.description: Whether the player can change the color of this building using paint.

canBeDamagedByAttacks.label: Can be damaged by attacks
canBeDamagedByAttacks.description: Whether this building takes damage from ranged and melee attacks.

isHopper.label: Is hopper
isHopper.description: If true, this building is a hopper that feeds adjacent processors with items.

quickTargetable.label: Quick targetable
quickTargetable.description: If true, this building can be quickly targeted by abilities without manual selection.

displayAttackToDestroyOnInspectPane.label: Display attack-to-destroy on inspect pane
displayAttackToDestroyOnInspectPane.description: If true, the damage required to destroy this building is shown in its inspect pane.

isEscapableContainer.label: Is escapable container
isEscapableContainer.description: If true, pawns trapped inside this building can attempt to escape.

isPowerConduit.label: Is power conduit
isPowerConduit.description: Whether this building acts as a power conduit for transmitting electricity.

biomeSpecific.label: Biome specific
biomeSpecific.description: If true, this building only appears in biomes that explicitly list it.

crater.label: Crater
crater.description: If true, this building is treated as a blast crater.

canLandGravshipOn.label: Can land gravship on
canLandGravshipOn.description: Whether a gravship can land on this building's footprint.

isAirtight.label: Is airtight
isAirtight.description: If true, this building prevents atmosphere from passing through its cell.

isStuffableAirtight.label: Is stuffable airtight
isStuffableAirtight.description: If true, airtightness depends on the stuff material this building is made from.

canConstructInCorner.label: Can construct in corner
canConstructInCorner.description: If true, this building can be placed in a diagonal corner cell.

isAttachment.label: Is attachment
isAttachment.description: If true, this building is a wall attachment that must be placed adjacent to a wall.

supportsWallAttachments.label: Supports wall attachments
supportsWallAttachments.description: If true, wall attachments can be placed on this building's face.

isPlayerEjectable.label: Is player ejectable
isPlayerEjectable.description: If true, the player can eject pawns from this building manually.

openingStartedSound.label: Opening started sound
openingStartedSound.description: SoundDef played at the moment this building begins its opening animation.

fullGraveGraphicData.label: Full grave graphic data
fullGraveGraphicData.description: Alternate graphic used when this grave building has a corpse inside it.

bed_healPerDay.label: Bed: heal per day
bed_healPerDay.description: Additional hit points restored per day to a pawn sleeping in this bed.

bed_defaultMedical.label: Bed: default medical
bed_defaultMedical.description: If true, this bed defaults to medical use for injured pawns.

bed_showSleeperBody.label: Bed: show sleeper body
bed_showSleeperBody.description: If true, the sleeping pawn's body is visible in this bed.

bed_humanlike.label: Bed: humanlike
bed_humanlike.description: If true, only humanlike pawns can sleep in this bed.

bed_maxBodySize.label: Bed: max body size
bed_maxBodySize.description: Maximum body size of pawn that can use this bed. 9999 means no limit.

bed_caravansCanUse.label: Bed: caravans can use
bed_caravansCanUse.description: Whether this bed is usable by caravan members when they rest at a campsite.

bed_slabBed.label: Bed: slab bed
bed_slabBed.description: If true, this is a slab-type bed (e.g. sleeping spot) with minimal comfort.

bed_crib.label: Bed: crib
bed_crib.description: If true, this bed is a crib for infants and young children.

bed_pawnDrawOffset.label: Bed: pawn draw offset
bed_pawnDrawOffset.description: Vertical draw offset applied to the sleeping pawn graphic.

bed_canBeMedical.label: Bed: can be medical
bed_canBeMedical.description: Whether this bed can be switched to medical use.

bed_DisplayOwnerType.label: Bed: display owner type
bed_DisplayOwnerType.description: Whether the owner type (colonist, prisoner, slave) is shown on this bed's inspect pane.

bed_DisplayOwnersInInspectString.label: Bed: display owners in inspect string
bed_DisplayOwnersInInspectString.description: Whether the current owner names are listed in this bed's inspect string.

bed_countsForBedroomOrBarracks.label: Bed: counts for bedroom or barracks
bed_countsForBedroomOrBarracks.description: Whether this bed counts toward the bedroom or barracks room role stat.

bed_emptyCountsForBarracks.label: Bed: empty counts for barracks
bed_emptyCountsForBarracks.description: If true, an unowned instance of this bed still counts toward the barracks room role.

bed_UseSheetColor.label: Bed: use sheet color
bed_UseSheetColor.description: If true, this bed renders a sheet whose color matches the owner's ideo color.

nutritionCostPerDispense.label: Nutrition cost per dispense
nutritionCostPerDispense.description: Nutrition consumed from a hopper per dispense action (e.g. nutrient paste dispenser).

soundDispense.label: Sound dispense
soundDispense.description: SoundDef played when this building dispenses an item.

turretGunDef.label: Turret gun def
turretGunDef.description: ThingDef that defines the weapon used by this turret, including verb and projectile properties.

turretBurstWarmupTime.label: Turret burst warmup time
turretBurstWarmupTime.description: FloatRange (min~max) for the random warmup delay before this turret fires a burst.

turretBurstCooldownTime.label: Turret burst cooldown time
turretBurstCooldownTime.description: Seconds between burst fire cycles. -1 derives from the weapon's verb cooldown.

turretInitialCooldownTime.label: Turret initial cooldown time
turretInitialCooldownTime.description: Seconds this turret waits after being built before it can fire for the first time.

turretTopDrawSize.label: Turret top draw size
turretTopDrawSize.description: Scale of the rotating top graphic drawn above the turret base.

turretTopOffset.label: Turret top offset
turretTopOffset.description: Position offset (x, z) of the rotating gun graphic relative to the building center.

playTargetAcquiredSound.label: Play target acquired sound
playTargetAcquiredSound.description: Whether this turret plays a sound when it acquires a new target.

turretTopLoadedGraphic.label: Turret top loaded graphic
turretTopLoadedGraphic.description: Alternate top graphic shown when this turret is loaded with a specific projectile type.

requiredMechWeightClasses.label: Required mech weight classes
requiredMechWeightClasses.description: MechWeightClassDef references for the mechanoid weight classes that can operate this turret.

ai_combatDangerous.label: AI: combat dangerous
ai_combatDangerous.description: If true, the AI considers this building an active combat threat and prioritizes destroying it.

ai_chillDestination.label: AI: chill destination
ai_chillDestination.description: If true, idle AI pawns may wander toward this building as a chill hangout spot.

ai_neverTrashThis.label: AI: never trash this
ai_neverTrashThis.description: If true, raider AI will not intentionally destroy this building as part of a rampage.

preferConnectingToFences.label: Prefer connecting to fences
preferConnectingToFences.description: If true, this building visually links to adjacent fences instead of walls.

roamerCanOpen.label: Roamer can open
roamerCanOpen.description: If true, roaming animals and non-player pawns can open this door.

soundDoorOpenPowered.label: Sound: door open (powered)
soundDoorOpenPowered.description: SoundDef played when this powered door opens.

soundDoorClosePowered.label: Sound: door close (powered)
soundDoorClosePowered.description: SoundDef played when this powered door closes.

soundDoorOpenManual.label: Sound: door open (manual)
soundDoorOpenManual.description: SoundDef played when this unpowered door is opened manually.

soundDoorCloseManual.label: Sound: door close (manual)
soundDoorCloseManual.description: SoundDef played when this unpowered door closes manually.

soundDoorCloseEnd.label: Sound: door close end
soundDoorCloseEnd.description: SoundDef played at the end of the door-close animation.

poweredDoorOpenSpeedFactor.label: Powered door open speed factor
poweredDoorOpenSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier on open speed while this door has power.

poweredDoorCloseSpeedFactor.label: Powered door close speed factor
poweredDoorCloseSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier on close speed while this door has power.

unpoweredDoorOpenSpeedFactor.label: Unpowered door open speed factor
unpoweredDoorOpenSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier on open speed when this door has no power.

unpoweredDoorCloseSpeedFactor.label: Unpowered door close speed factor
unpoweredDoorCloseSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier on close speed when this door has no power.

doorTempEqualizeIntervalClosed.label: Door temp equalize interval (closed)
doorTempEqualizeIntervalClosed.description: Game ticks between temperature equalization steps while this door is closed.

doorTempEqualizeIntervalOpen.label: Door temp equalize interval (open)
doorTempEqualizeIntervalOpen.description: Game ticks between temperature equalization steps while this door is open.

doorTempEqualizeRate.label: Door temp equalize rate
doorTempEqualizeRate.description: Fraction of the temperature difference equalized per interval.

sowTag.label: Sow tag
sowTag.description: Grow zone tag that determines which plants can be sown in this building (e.g. 'Hydroponic').

defaultPlantToGrow.label: Default plant to grow
defaultPlantToGrow.description: ThingDef of the plant initially selected when a new grow zone is placed on this building.

mineableThing.label: Mineable thing
mineableThing.description: ThingDef dropped when this natural rock wall is mined.

mineableYield.label: Mineable yield
mineableYield.description: Base count of mineableThing dropped per mining operation.

veinMineable.label: Vein mineable
veinMineable.description: If true, this rock generates as a contiguous ore vein rather than scattered chunks.

mineableNonMinedEfficiency.label: Mineable non-mined efficiency
mineableNonMinedEfficiency.description: Fraction of yield obtained when this resource is obtained without mining (e.g. harvesting chunks).

mineableDropChance.label: Mineable drop chance
mineableDropChance.description: Probability (0–1) that the mineable thing actually drops after each mining hit.

mineableYieldWasteable.label: Mineable yield wasteable
mineableYieldWasteable.description: If true, mining skill affects how much of the yield is wasted.

mineableScatterCommonality.label: Mineable scatter commonality
mineableScatterCommonality.description: Relative frequency with which this ore appears in scattered surface deposits on map gen.

mineableScatterLumpSizeRange.label: Mineable scatter lump size range
mineableScatterLumpSizeRange.description: IntRange (min~max) for the number of cells in each scattered surface ore lump.

mineablePreventMeteorite.label: Mineable prevent meteorite
mineablePreventMeteorite.description: If true, meteorites cannot land on top of this ore deposit.

mineablePreventNaturalRockOnSurface.label: Mineable prevent natural rock on surface
mineablePreventNaturalRockOnSurface.description: If true, surface generation does not place natural rock walls over this ore.

fixedStorageSettings.label: Fixed storage settings
fixedStorageSettings.description: Storage filter and priority locked to this building and not changeable by the player.

defaultStorageSettings.label: Default storage settings
defaultStorageSettings.description: Initial storage filter and priority applied when this building is first placed, editable by the player.

ignoreStoredThingsBeauty.label: Ignore stored things beauty
ignoreStoredThingsBeauty.description: If true, items stored inside this building do not contribute to room beauty calculations.

storageGroupTag.label: Storage group tag
storageGroupTag.description: Tag linking this building to a shared storage group with other buildings of the same tag.

groupingLabel.label: Grouping label
groupingLabel.description: Display label for the storage group shown in the UI.

groupingOrder.label: Grouping order
groupingOrder.description: Sort order of this building within its storage group.

isTrap.label: Is trap
isTrap.description: Whether this building is a trap that triggers when pawns step on it.

trapDestroyOnSpring.label: Trap destroy on spring
trapDestroyOnSpring.description: If true, this trap is destroyed when it triggers.

trapPeacefulWildAnimalsSpringChanceFacto.label: Trap peaceful wild animals spring chance factor
trapPeacefulWildAnimalsSpringChanceFacto.description: Multiplier on the chance that a peaceful wild animal triggers this trap.

trapDamageCategory.label: Trap damage category
trapDamageCategory.description: DamageArmorCategoryDef used for armor penetration calculations when this trap damages a pawn.

trapUnarmedGraphicData.label: Trap unarmed graphic data
trapUnarmedGraphicData.description: Graphic shown when this trap has been triggered but not yet re-armed.

workTableRoomRole.label: Work table room role
workTableRoomRole.description: RoomRoleDef for the optimal room type this work table benefits from (e.g. workshop).

workTableNotInRoomRoleFactor.label: Work table not-in-room-role factor
workTableNotInRoomRoleFactor.description: Work speed multiplier applied when this table is not in its optimal room type.

unpoweredWorkTableWorkSpeedFactor.label: Unpowered work table work speed factor
unpoweredWorkTableWorkSpeedFactor.description: Work speed multiplier applied when this work table has no power.

workTableCompleteSoundDef.label: Work table complete sound
workTableCompleteSoundDef.description: SoundDef played when a recipe finishes at this work table.

watchBuildingStandDistanceRange.label: Watch building stand distance range
watchBuildingStandDistanceRange.description: IntRange (min~max) of cells from this building within which watchers must stand.

watchBuildingStandRectWidth.label: Watch building stand rect width
watchBuildingStandRectWidth.description: Width in cells of the rectangle in front of this building where watchers can stand.

watchBuildingInSameRoom.label: Watch building in same room
watchBuildingInSameRoom.description: If true, watchers must be in the same room as this building to receive the joy benefit.

joyKind.label: Joy kind
joyKind.description: JoyKindDef for the type of recreation this building provides.

haulToContainerDuration.label: Haul to container duration
haulToContainerDuration.description: Game ticks a pawn spends hauling an item into this container.

instrumentRange.label: Instrument range
instrumentRange.description: Radius in cells within which pawns can hear and enjoy this instrument building.

minDistanceToSameTypeOfBuilding.label: Min distance to same type of building
minDistanceToSameTypeOfBuilding.description: Minimum cell distance required between two instances of this building.

artificialForMeditationPurposes.label: Artificial for meditation purposes
artificialForMeditationPurposes.description: If true, this building counts as an artificial structure reducing meditation focus near nature.

effectWatching.label: Effect watching
effectWatching.description: EffecterDef played while a pawn is watching this building for joy.

gibbetCageTopGraphicData.label: Gibbet cage top graphic data
gibbetCageTopGraphicData.description: Graphic drawn on top of the gibbet cage structure.

gibbetCorposeDrawOffset.label: Gibbet corpse draw offset
gibbetCorposeDrawOffset.description: Position offset applied when drawing the corpse inside the gibbet cage.

gibbetCagePlaceCorpseEffecter.label: Gibbet cage place corpse effecter
gibbetCagePlaceCorpseEffecter.description: EffecterDef played when a corpse is placed in the gibbet cage.

openingEffect.label: Opening effect
openingEffect.description: EffecterDef played while this building is in its opening animation.

barDrawData.label: Bar draw data
barDrawData.description: Fillable bar configuration per rotation direction for displaying progress bars on this building.

gestatorFormingMote.label: Gestator forming mote
gestatorFormingMote.description: Mote played per rotation while a mech is forming inside this gestator.

gestatorCycleCompleteMote.label: Gestator cycle complete mote
gestatorCycleCompleteMote.description: Mote played per rotation when a gestator cycle completes.

gestatorFormedMote.label: Gestator formed mote
gestatorFormedMote.description: Mote played per rotation when a mech finishes forming.

mechGestatorCylinderGraphic.label: Mech gestator cylinder graphic
mechGestatorCylinderGraphic.description: Graphic drawn for the cylinder portion of the mech gestator.

mechGestatorTopGraphic.label: Mech gestator top graphic
mechGestatorTopGraphic.description: Graphic drawn for the top cap of the mech gestator.

formingGraphicData.label: Forming graphic data
formingGraphicData.description: Graphic shown for the mech being formed inside the gestator.

formingMechBobSpeed.label: Forming mech bob speed
formingMechBobSpeed.description: Speed of the vertical bobbing animation applied to the forming mech graphic.

formingMechYBobDistance.label: Forming mech Y bob distance
formingMechYBobDistance.description: Amplitude of the vertical bob in world units.

formingMechPerRotationOffset.label: Forming mech per-rotation offset
formingMechPerRotationOffset.description: List of Vector3 position offsets (one per rotation direction N/E/S/W) for the forming mech graphic.

maxFormedMechDrawSize.label: Max formed mech draw size
maxFormedMechDrawSize.description: Maximum draw size (x, z) clamp applied to the forming mech graphic.

subcoreScannerFixedIngredients.label: Subcore scanner fixed ingredients
subcoreScannerFixedIngredients.description: Fixed list of ingredient counts consumed by the subcore scanner per operation.

subcoreScannerTicks.label: Subcore scanner ticks
subcoreScannerTicks.description: Game ticks the subcore scanner takes to complete one operation.

subcoreScannerHediff.label: Subcore scanner hediff
subcoreScannerHediff.description: HediffDef applied to the pawn being scanned during the subcore extraction.

destroyBrain.label: Destroy brain
destroyBrain.description: If true, the subcore scanner destroys the target pawn's brain on completion.

subcoreScannerOutputDef.label: Subcore scanner output def
subcoreScannerOutputDef.description: ThingDef produced by the subcore scanner when the operation completes.

subcoreScannerStartEffect.label: Subcore scanner start effect
subcoreScannerStartEffect.description: EffecterDef played when the subcore scanner begins a new operation.

subcoreScannerWorking.label: Subcore scanner working sound
subcoreScannerWorking.description: SoundDef looped while the subcore scanner is actively operating.

subcoreScannerComplete.label: Subcore scanner complete sound
subcoreScannerComplete.description: SoundDef played when the subcore scanner finishes an operation.

isInsectCocoon.label: Is insect cocoon
isInsectCocoon.description: If true, this building is an insect cocoon that can hatch hostile insects.

wastepackAtomizerBottomGraphic.label: Wastepack atomizer bottom graphic
wastepackAtomizerBottomGraphic.description: Bottom-layer graphic for the wastepack atomizer building.

wastepackAtomizerWindowGraphic.label: Wastepack atomizer window graphic
wastepackAtomizerWindowGraphic.description: Window-layer graphic for the wastepack atomizer building.

wastepackAtomizerOperationEffecter.label: Wastepack atomizer operation effecter
wastepackAtomizerOperationEffecter.description: EffecterDef played while the wastepack atomizer is processing waste.

bookendGraphicEast.label: Bookend graphic (east)
bookendGraphicEast.description: Graphic shown on the east-facing bookend of a bookcase building.

bookendGraphicNorth.label: Bookend graphic (north)
bookendGraphicNorth.description: Graphic shown on the north-facing bookend of a bookcase building.

isSupportDoor.label: Is support door
isSupportDoor.description: If true, this door has a support structure that renders separately from the moving panel.

doorTopGraphic.label: Door top graphic
doorTopGraphic.description: Graphic for the upper panel of this support door.

doorSupportGraphic.label: Door support graphic
doorSupportGraphic.description: Graphic for the fixed support frame of this door.

upperMoverGraphic.label: Upper mover graphic
upperMoverGraphic.description: Graphic for the upper moving section of this door.

doorTopGraphicOffset.label: Door top graphic offset
doorTopGraphicOffset.description: World-space position offset applied to the door top graphic.

doorSupportGraphicOffset.label: Door support graphic offset
doorSupportGraphicOffset.description: World-space position offset applied to the door support graphic.

doorTopHorizontalOffset.label: Door top horizontal offset
doorTopHorizontalOffset.description: Offset applied to the door top when the door is oriented horizontally.

doorTopVerticalOffset.label: Door top vertical offset
doorTopVerticalOffset.description: Offset applied to the door top when the door is oriented vertically.

groundSpawnerThingToSpawn.label: Ground spawner thing to spawn
groundSpawnerThingToSpawn.description: ThingDef this ground-spawner building produces when its timer elapses.

groundSpawnerSpawnDelay.label: Ground spawner spawn delay
groundSpawnerSpawnDelay.description: IntRange (min~max) of game ticks between ground spawner activation and the thing appearing.

groundSpawnerDestroyAdjacent.label: Ground spawner destroy adjacent
groundSpawnerDestroyAdjacent.description: If true, adjacent buildings in the spawn footprint are destroyed when the thing appears.

groundSpawnerSustainerSound.label: Ground spawner sustainer sound
groundSpawnerSustainerSound.description: SoundDef looped while this ground spawner is active and counting down.

groundSpawnerSustainedEffecter.label: Ground spawner sustained effecter
groundSpawnerSustainedEffecter.description: EffecterDef played continuously while this ground spawner is active.

groundSpawnerCompleteEffecter.label: Ground spawner complete effecter
groundSpawnerCompleteEffecter.description: EffecterDef played when the ground spawner finishes and the thing appears.

groundSpawnerLetterLabel.label: Ground spawner letter label
groundSpawnerLetterLabel.description: Title of the alert letter shown when this ground spawner completes.

groundSpawnerLetterText.label: Ground spawner letter text
groundSpawnerLetterText.description: Body text of the alert letter shown when this ground spawner completes.
